Cookie.title: We use cookies
Cookie.description: We use cookies to enhance your experience, analyze traffic, and show relevant content. By clicking 'Accept all', you consent to the use of all cookies.

Home.heroSub: Premium Heavy Equipment Solutions. Own fleet of Volvo and JCB excavators ready for your major projects.
Home.feat1Desc: Original Volvo and JCB machinery maintained to the highest international standards.
Home.feat2Desc: Highly skilled drivers with years of experience on complex construction sites.
Home.feat3Desc: Fast delivery to any site in Tajikistan within 24 hours of agreement.
Home.ctaSub: Get professional consultation and the best rates for heavy machinery rental today.
Home.block1Desc: Our Volvo and JCB fleet is equipped with the latest technology to ensure maximum efficiency on your construction site. From foundation digging to massive earthmoving.
Home.block2Desc: We don't just rent machines; we provide precision. Our operators have over 10 years of experience in the toughest terrains of Tajikistan.

Services.heroSub: We don't just rent out equipment — we perform a full cycle of works for your project in Tajikistan.
Services.s1Desc: Excavation of pits of any depth for foundations of residential complexes and industrial facilities.
Services.s2Desc: Preparation of the roadbed, removal of old asphalt, and digging trenches for curbs.
Services.s3Desc: Demolition of dilapidated buildings and concrete structures. Site preparation for new construction.
Services.s4Desc: Cleaning of ditches, creation of irrigation canals, and digging trenches for water pipes.
Services.ctaDesc: Our engineer will come to the site, estimate the soil volume, and select the right excavator.

Contact.heroSub: Leave a request or call us — we are always in touch and ready to answer any questions
Contact.infoSub: We are always happy to help you with the choice of equipment and answer all questions
Contact.emailSub: We will answer within an hour
Contact.consent: By clicking the button, you agree to the processing of personal data

About.aboutTitle1: We are building the future of
About.aboutText: DigMaster is not just a rental service. It is a family business built on professionalism and knowledge of every inch of our region's land. We started with one old loader, and today we own a fleet of modern Volvo and JCB machines.

advList.4: Delivery on the day of request

About.ctaSub: Contact us now - we'll deliver equipment today
